greeting.confirmBody: Before we continue, please confirm this is your business.
greeting.title: Hi {name}!
greeting.body: We've prepared a short interactive interview to understand {company} and shape the right online solution for your business. It takes 10–15 minutes and you can pause anytime.

phase_0.title: Tell us about your business
phase_0.helper: A short intake so we can personalize everything that follows.
phase_0.placeholder: What do you do? What's working? What's costing you time or customers?

phase_1.title: Business Profile
phase_1.helper: Confirm your details and pick your category.
phase_1.placeholder: Business profile content lands in session S2.2.

phase_2.title: Services
phase_2.helper: Choose the services you're interested in.
phase_2.placeholder: Service selection lands in session S2.3.

phase_3.title: Branding & Look/Feel
phase_3.helper: Tell us about the style you want.
phase_3.placeholder: Branding phase lands in session S2.4.

phase_4.title: Content & Social
phase_4.placeholder: Content & social phase lands in session S2.5.

phase_5.title: Growth & Operations
phase_5.helper: Notifications, marketing, lead-gen and ops tooling.
phase_5.placeholder: Growth & operations phase lands in session S2.5.

phase_6.title: Budget & Timeline
phase_6.placeholder: Budget & timeline phase lands in session S2.6.

review.title: Review your specification
review.helper: We'll compile everything into a specification for you to review.
review.placeholder: The real specification preview lands in session S3.5.

phase1.categoryHeading: What kind of business do you run?
phase1.otherDescription: Describe your business in a few words
phase1.otherHint: We'll flag this for a quick manual review.
phase1.requiredHint: Pick a category and niche (or describe your own) to continue.

submit.confirmBody: We'll start reviewing your specification and get back to you soon.
submit.closingBody: We're reviewing your specification and will get back to you within a few business days with a tailored assessment and proposal.
